title: BEREAVEMENT SUPPORT - 211info
text: FIRST CANDLE BEREAVEMENT SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers bereavement support for families grieving the loss of a child or infant through one-on-one support, access to informational materials, and referrals to local support services. 21 Locust Avenue Suite 2B New Canaan, CT 06840 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 221-7437 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Grief Support Hotline (800) 221-7437 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Bereaved Parent Support Groups * Sudden Infant Death Syndrome Bereavement and Grief Counseling * Sudden Infant Death Syndrome If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FIRST CANDLE
